column1: # Provenance: 22 obligation-year ROC-price rows reconstructed from Ofgem annual-report XLSX companions.
# Buyout + recycle + e-ROC clearing + mutualisation totals per obligation year
# Primary discovery URL:
#   https://www.ofgem.gov.uk/renewables-obligation-ro/contacts-guidance-and-resources/public-reports-and-data-ro
# Sources (D-03 multi-source sidecar — full sha256 + retrieved_on in sibling .meta.json sources[] array):
# SY9-SY22 (2010-11 to 2023-24): EXACT values extracted from
#   Figure A4.1 "Determination of ROC recycle value since SY9"
#   in Ofgem RO Annual Report SY22 dataset companion XLSX
#   (data/raw/ofgem/ro_annual_report_sy22_dataset.xlsx)
#   Columns used: "Recycle value per ROC presented" (= recycle_gbp_per_roc)
#                 "Worth of a ROC to a supplier" (= buyout + recycle)
#   buyout_gbp_per_roc = worth - recycle (derived
#   VERIFIED 2026-04-25: 14/14 cells matched within ±£0.005 vs Figure A4.1 source cells.
# SY23 row (2024-25) also confirmed from SY23 companion XLSX Figure A4.1 but
#   is OUTSIDE the 22-year span (OY 2002-03 to 2023-24) and not included here.
# SY5-SY8 (2006-07 to 2009-10): DERIVED from primary-source XLSX cells:
#   derivation_method: recycle = redistributed / rocs_issued
#   - Redistribution amounts (numerator): SY18 XLSX "4. Supplier Compliance" Table 4.5
#   - Annual ROC issue totals (denominator): 12-year XLSX "ROCs by Tech & Country" annual sections
#   (ROCs issued ≈ ROCs presented; SY9 cross-check confirms <0.1% drift)
#   Statutory buyout prices from UK SI instruments (SI 2006/3270
#   Note: derivation from primary-source XLSX cells is traceable and reproducible (auditor can
#   recompute by dividing the redistribution total by the annual ROC issuance count).
# SY1-SY4 (2002-03 to 2005-06): DEFERRED — no Ofgem-published recycle value found.
#   Searched: site:ofgem.gov.uk "RO buyout price" for 2002-03
#   all Ofgem transparency document PDF URLs for SY1-SY4 returned 404. No Wayback
#   Archive copy located. Statutory buyout prices from UK SI instruments (SI 2002/914

column3: 2005/3093) are available but without a primary-source recycle

column1: #   value the per-ROC subsidy cost cannot be computed. Rows retained as obligation_year-only
#   with price columns empty (NaN). Will be populated when a primary-source recycle
#   value is located (see backlog 999.2).
# D-11: mutualisation_gbp_total is non-zero ONLY for SY20 (2021-22) — one-off ROC
#   supplier-default event. Amount = RO + ROS combined per SY22 XLSX Figures A3.3 + A3.4.
#   All other obligation years carry mutualisation_gbp_total=0.
# eroc_gbp_per_roc: DEFERRED — e-ROC quarterly auction clearing prices not transcribed.
#   e-ROC auctions commenced SY9 (2010-11). No e-ROC market before that.
#   All rows carry eroc_gbp_per_roc=None (null). Pipeline falls back to (buyout + recycle)
#   when eroc is null — see cost_model.py. Documented in REQUIREMENTS.md RO-04/RO-05.
# REF Constable 2025 Table 1 (tests/fixtures/benchmarks.yaml::ref_constable) is the
# cross-check anchor — scheme values must reconcile within ±3% per scheme year (D-14).
# DIVERGENCE.md gates this test while Option-D stubs remain active.
# Schema (pinned in src/uk_subsidy_tracker/data/roc_prices.py::roc_prices_schema and
#   src/uk_subsidy_tracker/data/ofgem_aggregate.py::ofgem_roc_prices_schema):
#   obligation_year        : ^\d{4}-\d{2}$ (e.g. 2022-23)
#   buyout_gbp_per_roc     : float64 nullable — statutory buy-out price (£/ROC); null = deferred (SY1-SY4)
#   recycle_gbp_per_roc    : float64 nullable — recycle value (£/ROC); null = deferred (SY1-SY4)
#   eroc_gbp_per_roc       : float64 nullable — e-ROC clearing price (£/ROC); null = deferred (all rows)
#   mutualisation_gbp_total: float64 nullable — total mutualisation payment (GBP
